reviews.review_description: all of the other games out there do not have any mining in it except for animal company and this is a very fun game it's goofy and i just wish the mining would be able for you to mine it is great for parkour and training five out of five game in my opinion.

I am sorry for the bad review but the arms are wonky and it’s so hard to type on the keyboard and my friend was stuck when you load in and mines didn’t even work sorry for the one star but the game needs some work.

reviews.review_title: THIS IS A ABSOLUTELY NON GOOD GAME
reviews.review_description: This game has no time put into it just smack things together and call it a day doesn’t even deserve to be a game PUT MORE TIME INTO ITTTTTTTT
